stories.title: Carry the starter trace through delivery and release readiness
stories.narrative: As a new ProductOS adopter, I want the starter workspace to show one canonical item through release readiness so I can understand the intended lifecycle shape before replacing the demo data.

implementation_context_refs.title: Starter Release-Readiness Review
implementation_context_refs.summary: A simple walkthrough of how the seeded starter trace reaches bounded release readiness.
